title: Enderman Overhaul
description: Enderman Overhaul adds over 20 new enderman variants, each with their own sounds, models, and animations!
body:
Enderman Overhaul adds over 20 new endermen variants, each with their own sounds, models, and animations!

Ender Pearls:

As well as endermen, this mod also overhauls the ender pearl with 8 new variations! Soul pearl - Dropped from the soulsand valley enderman, and can be bound to mobs to teleport them remotely. Summoner pearl - Dropped from the swamp & end islands enderman, and teleports all nearby mobs to one point. Corrupted pearl - Dropped from the end enderman, and randomly teleports hit enemies. Bubble pearl - Dropped from the ocean enderman, and floats through the air slowly without being affected by gravity. Warped pearl - Dropped from the warped enderman, and effects the player with resistance when landing. Crimson pearl - Dropped from the crimson enderman, and effects the player with strength when landing. Icy pearl - Dropped from the ice spikes enderman, and freezes nearby enemies when landing. Ancient pearl - Dropped from the end islands enderman, and summons pet endermen which will fight for the player, and can be recalled when right clicked.


Josh/Joosh - Art
AlexNijjar - Programming
Scratchy - Sound effects

[**Ghost**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ghost) A mod which adds two friendly ghost mobs to your world!
[**Golem overhaul**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/golem-overhaul) A mod which adds 9 new golem types!
[**Nightlights**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/nightlights) A mod that adds a variety of new light sources to Minecraft!
[**Lookin' sharp**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/lookin-sharp) Adding 60 new melee weapons to the game!
[**Ribbits**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ribbits) Ribbits adds new swamp villages, full of frog villagers!
